title: Choose what an API key does in your organization
description:
You can now choose what an API key can do with scopes, which are specifically the actions an API key has permission to perform. You’re able to allow APIs to view, write, and delete content in your organization. To create an API key with scopes: Go to admin.atlassian.com. Select your organization if you have more than one.
	Select Settings > API keys.
	Select Create API key.
	Enter a Name that makes it easy to remember the API key.
	Select the expiration date for the API key. Keys can last no lon
